hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';const isTs=f.endsWith('.ts')||f.endsWith('.tsx');process.exit(isTs?0:1);})" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || true

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(j.tool_input||{}).command||'';const isTest=/npm (run )?test|npx playwright test/.test(cmd);if(isTest)console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Tests complete. Open report: npm run report'}));process.exit(0);})"
output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); rc=$?; echo "$output"; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && exit 2 || exit 0
